description_long: This object is an irregularly shaped, medium-sized potato with a rough, earthy brown skin. The surface displays natural blemishes, small indentations, and subtle color variations typical of a freshly harvested Russet potato. Its form is slightly oblong, with one end more rounded and the other tapering gently. The skin appears dry and matte, with a few darker spots and minor scarring, indicating it has not been washed or peeled. The potato's texture is semi-soft to the touch, with a firm but yielding feel under moderate pressure. Overall, it resembles a common potato that might be found in a grocery store or on the ground in a garden.
description: A medium-sized, oblong potato with rough, earthy brown skin and natural blemishes. Its surface is matte, dry, and slightly uneven.
description_view_0: This view shows the potato's more rounded end, highlighting its uneven surface and a few small blemishes.
description_view_1: The potato appears more elongated from this side, with the full length and some darker spots visible along the skin.
description_view_2: This angle emphasizes the broader, flatter side of the potato, showing subtle color variations and surface texture.
description_view_3: The opposite elongated side is visible here, with a slightly more tapered end and a few dark marks.
attribute_contextual_placement: piled in a bin or basket with other potatoes
attribute_human_interaction: People typically pick up, wash, peel, cut, or cook this object by hand.
